Hyperion Enterprises Announcement: Hyperium is definitely completely useless and must be handed over to the Hyperion Officials as soon as one finds it in their possession. No exceptions. Find the Official Hyperion Resource Acquisition and Destruction Division Representative in Ironhaven on ARIS and get your reward today!
Uranopilite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes
Muscovite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. Commonly used in the manufacture of electronics, and as a replacement for glass in extreme temperature applications.
Obsius Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. The ore is formed during volcano eruptions.
Vermiculite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. Lightweight and extremely heat resistant, if treated right it can withstand temperatures of up to 1150 celsius.
Jonesite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. Extremely rare, but incredibly useful when handling radioactive materials.
Sugilite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. Used in metaphysical and healing practices.
Cummingtonite Ore has to be refined to become a useful construction resource.
Verderon Eyes are essential for various construction purposes.
Spina Nest Samples are essential for various construction purposes.

Primonaut Elder Essence is still being researched, and its uses are not fully understood yet. It can be sold to the Hyperion Science Division in Ironhaven for further study. However, the researchers have found some uses in various construction purposes.
Mortirex Skin is essential for various construction purposes. The thick and rough hide of the Mortirex.
Anthophyllite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes
Verderon Skin is essential for various construction purposes. The thick and rough hide of the Verderon.
Snake Oil is essential for various construction purposes. Incredible resource that you must acquire as soon as possible!
A reward issue by Hyperion Mangers for completing daily missions. Can be exchanged for various goods, supplies, and special rewards as a token of appreciate for your efforts.

Emebrstone are essential for various construction purposes.
Cryogenic Residue is essential for various construction purposes. A byproduct of the mutation of the Cryomusoids caused by the coolant liquid.

Coolant Crystals are essential for various construction purposes. A byproduct of the mutation of the Cryomusoids caused by the coolant liquid.

CushionCore Padding is the result of a construction process, and they are essential for various construction purposes.

Developed by Hyperion Enterprises Advanced Armament and Strategic Applications Division, the new CushionCore Padding redefines comfort and protection. Designed to absorb impact, regulate body temperature, and feel impossibly smooth against the skin, it's the perfect inner layer for any serious armor system. 

This is elite-grade padding--for those who demand more than just defense.

This product description is brought to you by the Hyperion Enterprises Marketing and Communications Division Thank you for choosing Hyperion!

FlexPlate Fabric is the result of a construction process, and they are essential for various construction purposes. 

Developed by Hyperion Enterprises Advanced Armament and Strategic Applications Division, the cutting-edge FlexPlate Fabric offers high durability in all the right places. Engineered to breathe while staying fully waterproof, it shrugs off most bullets and deflects limited laser and plasma fire--though extended exposure is not recommended.

Flexible, resilient, and combat-proven--this is protection without compromise.

This product description is brought to you by the Hyperion Enterprises Marketing and Communications Division Thank you for choosing Hyperion!

Oxidized Springs have to be refined to become a useful construction resource.
Fractured Servos have to be refined to become a useful construction resource.
Broken Power Cores have to be refined to become a useful construction resource.
Acidic Essence is essential for various construction purposes. Found in most animals on the planet because of the polluted water.
Fierling Fingers are essential for various construction purposes.
Primonaut Claws are incredibly sharp, and are essential for various construction purposes where extreme sharpness is beneficial.
Cassiterite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. Used for different purposes related to the extraction and refining of minerals.
Rutile Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. Highly effective in the absorption of ultraviolet radiation.
Cinnabar Ingots are essential for various construction purposes. Toxic! Handle with care.
Hoelite Ingots are essential for various construction purposes.

Grants access to any of the 4 levels of the "Infernal Basilica of Phorcys", an instanced dungeon-like area in Ancient Greece. This key is one-time use only. A more detailed guide may be added here in the future.

Arthur McGrangus has done it again! Following the success of the Distilled Sweat Crystal, he is back with the improved version, the Refined Sweat Crystal! You can find him in Ironhaven on ARIS if you would like to know more, or just praise his genius. 

Refined Sweat Crystals are essential for various construction purposes.

"This piece of modified malware can infect vulnerable terminals. The results however might be unpredictable if released into the main system."

 

Using it at the terminal 135532, 93972 (near empire Z building) randomly spawns shared loot:

- Zombie Kong
- 50 Foot Android Party Girl + others (6-8 50 foot ones in total)
- THING  
- Radiated Spider x2
- Motorhead Princess
- Root Kong
- Virus Kong  
- Trojan Kong
- King Kong
These tokens can be used to teleport between Space Stations.
Used for AI hand in near [Calypso, 57851, 83173, 194, Waypoint]

One of the components used to refine the Zyn Improved Rucksack. You can get more information from Zyn'Phyer in the Biocontainment Gardens.
Received from Umbranoid dailies at Nyx Outpost

Looted from space asteroids. Can be recycled into ores, gems and astral fragments via Tailing Recycle Station located in every space station with additional recycling scrip payment:

- 1 scrip to recycle 10 PED
- 7 scrips for 100 PED
- 50 scrips for 1000 PED.

Possible loot:

Iron Stone, Lysterium Stone, Belkar Stone, Ignisium Stone, Azzurdite Stone, Copper Stone, Gold Stone, Cobalt Stone, Pyrite Stone, Dianum Ore, Adomasite Stone, Platinum Stone, Quantium Stone, Redulite Ore, Vesperdite Ore, Morpheus Stone, Lanorium Stone, Pile Of Garnets, Pile Of Emeralds, Pile Of Opals, Pile Of Rubies, Pile Of Diamonds, Astral Fragment.

This is a mechanical component that was once used by Umbranoids. As they are not known to be capable of the precision engineering required to make something like this, it is likely that they stole it or traded for it and then modified it to their needs.

It can be used for crafting certain Umbranoid designs, but can also be refined together with the corresponding weapon shard to create an Umbranoid Tech Crate which can be handed in for a reward.

A reward from the Zyn'viathan Epic mission on planet Cyrene.

This is combined with the other coins to create the Fabled Genesis Key to enter Genesis Beach.

This item is tradeable.

This seems to be an almost LIVING fragment of something much larger.
There's a small bit of power radiating from this as well, could be used to bestow additional properties to a crafted item...

Access to Hologram room.
received after completion of initial DSEC-9 Missions which you can get from Valeria by DSEC9 TP
500 GB HDD is a material used in upgrading DSEC armour piece to Adjusted,Workstation Holoroom.
Metal residue is a waste material coming from manufacturing processes.

RDI keeps their secrets firmly under lock and key. Who knows what this passkey to one of their secured labs could uncover…
